role: Clerical member of the Guardian Council (reappointed 2022)
bio: Mohammad-Reza Modarresi Yazdi is a clerical member of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council), reappointed by [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) in July 2022 alongside Mehdi Shabzendedar Jahromi. A jurist from the Yazd clerical tradition, he is one of the six faqih members directly appointed by the Supreme Leader.
editorial_notes: Birth year not publicly confirmed. Reappointed to Guardian Council by Khamenei in July 2022.
